caption: A hardcover book is showcased against a plain, light-colored background. The book's white cover features bold red and black text, along with a small photograph of a man wearing a dark suit and white shirt. The title, "THE ART OF TIMING THE TRADE," is written in large, red, uppercase letters. Below the title, the text "YOUR ULTIMATE TRADING MASTERY SYSTEM" is printed in black. A red band wraps around the bottom edge of the cover, featuring the author's name, "TOM O'BRIEN," in white uppercase letters, followed by smaller text that reads, "FOUNDER, OWNER AND CEO OF THE". Across the sequence, the camera smoothly zooms in on the book, moving from a distant, angled perspective to a closer, clearer view of the front cover, emphasizing the title and author's name.
